prompt: Adorable cozy isometric 3D miniature bathroom diorama, warm terracotta and beige color palette, Japanese-style tiny bathroom scene viewed from a 45-degree corner angle. Cream ceramic subway tiles with warm wooden trim, vintage clawfoot bathtub filled with blue bubbly foam and a wooden bath tray holding an open laptop, green mug, soap, and lit candles. Small potted plant, golden brass curved shower rod with beige curtain, round wooden mirror above a white porcelain sink with wooden vanity cabinet and brass faucet. Toilet with wooden seat, wooden stool with rolled white towels and stacked books, green wine bottle, tiny bonsai plant, wall-mounted gold sconces glowing warmly. Light blue fluffy towel on wall hook, wicker laundry hamper full of colorful towels, round plush purple bath mat, checkered beige-white floor tiles. Soft warm golden hour lighting, cozy ambient glow, tilt-shift miniature photography effect, dollhouse aesthetic, 8k hyperdetailed, soft bokeh, extremely intricate miniature textures, trending on Artstation.
